options.label: A
options.text: A force that pushes objects forward

options.label: B
options.text: A force that opposes motion between two surfaces in contact

options.label: C
options.text: A force that only acts on metals

correct_answer: A force that opposes motion between two surfaces in contact
explanation: Friction is a resistive force that acts between two surfaces when one tries to move past the other. It always opposes the direction of motion.
